decisions.title: No story split.
decisions.detail: S011's two stories (text edit, drawio edit) already cleanly target a single user-facing behavior each. Split would only add ceremony.

decisions.title: Edit existing files only.
decisions.detail: S011 does not introduce file *creation* from the Files tab. Backlog item if requested later. WriteFile refuses `os.ErrNotExist` so an accidental new-file PUT fails cleanly.

decisions.title: No diff-based 3-way conflict UI.
decisions.detail: ROADMAP only requires reload / overwrite / cancel. Full diff merge is heavier and lands better as a Backlog item once Git Core (S012) introduces the diff viewer infra.

decisions.title: ETag formula
decisions.detail: = base64(sha256(`<unix_nano>.<size>`)[:8]). Short (12 chars), fits in `If-Match` headers without escaping, deterministic across stat calls. Hashing the full content was rejected тАФ DESIGN PRINCIPLES "щАЯуБД" trumps "perfectly precise" for a single-user editor. Risk: if size+mtime collide on two clients writing at the same nano the ETag is identical; tolerable for single-user/optimistic-locking.

decisions.title: Atomic write
decisions.detail: via temp-file-then-rename in the same dir. `O_TMPFILE` on Linux would be slightly cleaner but rename(2) already buys us crash-safety and is portable to anywhere Go runs.

decisions.title: PUT contract
decisions.detail: `If-Match` is **required** тАФ missing тЖТ 428 Precondition Required (per ROADMAP). Mismatch тЖТ 412 + `currentEtag` in body so the client conflict dialog can drive Reload / Overwrite.

decisions.title: Body size cap
decisions.detail: = 32 MiB. Hardcoded in `handler.writeFile`; no setting yet because the Files tab is human-typed input. Backlog if a real use case appears.

decisions.title: JSON envelope
decisions.detail: rather than raw bytes for the PUT body. Keeps the API uniform with the rest of `/api`, and leaves room to add fields (`encoding: 'base64'` for binaries) without a breaking change.

decisions.title: Same URL
decisions.detail: for GET and PUT (`/files/raw?path=тАж`). Symmetric REST surface, easier to reason about than `/files/raw` vs `/files/save`.

decisions.title: `useEditorStore` (Zustand)
decisions.detail: rather than React component state. DESIGN PRINCIPLES "ф╕ЛцЫ╕уБНуБпчйНце╡ф┐ЭцМБ" тАФ drafts must survive tab switches inside the same branch. Keyed by `{repoId}/{branchId}/{path}`. Forgets the entry on unmount only when the buffer is clean.

decisions.title: `defaultValue` (uncontrolled) + `key=editorKey::mode`
decisions.detail: for Monaco rather than fully controlled `value=`. Streaming `value` on every keystroke fights Monaco's internal model and causes cursor jumps. We lift state via `onChange` only.

decisions.title: Conflict dialog as a separate component
decisions.detail: (`conflict-dialog.tsx`) reusable by both Monaco and Drawio edit paths. ROADMAP S011-2-5 explicitly asks for reuse.

decisions.title: Edit-mode VISION-scope-out disables stay enabled in edit mode.
decisions.detail: `quickSuggestions: false`, `parameterHints.enabled: false`, `suggestOnTriggerCharacters: false`, `wordBasedSuggestions: 'off'`, `acceptSuggestionOnEnter: 'off'`, `hover.enabled: false`, `occurrencesHighlight: 'off'`. The only difference between READ_ONLY and EDIT options is `readOnly` / `domReadOnly` / `contextmenu`. Verified by E2E (e) тАФ typing a long identifier prefix does NOT light up the suggest widget.

decisions.title: drawio mobile gating: `< 900px` disables the Edit button
decisions.detail: with a tooltip telling the user to open on a wider screen. ROADMAP S011-2-6 framed this as "шжЦщЗО" тАФ we picked Disable as the safer default since drawio's touch palette is genuinely unusable on phone-width screens. The text editor stays available on mobile because Monaco's touch selection works fine.

decisions.title: `beforeunload` guard
decisions.detail: runs from FilePreview's effect; reads `hasAnyDirty(state)` so any unsaved file across the app gates the unload. Browsers ignore custom messages but still show the native prompt when `e.preventDefault()` runs.

decisions.title: `window.confirm` for in-app dirty switches
decisions.detail: тАФ DESIGN PRINCIPLES "цШОчд║чЪД > цЪЧщ╗ЩчЪД". Custom dialog could ship later; the native confirm is plenty until we have a richer modal stack.

decisions.title: Two iframe URLs
decisions.detail: rather than reloading via postMessage. Re-mounting the iframe with `key=mode` is the simplest way to force drawio into the right chrome state, and saves us from chasing drawio's init-protocol changes when toggling.

decisions.title: `autosave: 1` in edit mode
decisions.detail: so drawio emits `event: 'autosave'` on every model change. We treat that XML as the latest draft and light up the dirty badge.

decisions.title: Ctrl+S forwarding via host-window keydown
decisions.detail: тЖТ posts `{action: 'save'}` into drawio. drawio's own save catches the keypress when the iframe has focus; this is the safety net for when the user's focus is elsewhere on the page.

decisions.title: Go unit tests
decisions.detail: (`internal/tab/files/write_test.go`): ETag stability, atomic write + perm preservation, missing-file rejection, traversal rejection.

decisions.title: Playwright E2E `tests/e2e/s011_text_edit.py`
decisions.detail: covers all 7 acceptance criteria for S011-1 plus the API-level 428/412/200 flow.

decisions.title: Playwright E2E `tests/e2e/s011_drawio_edit.py`
decisions.detail: covers the viewтЖТedit URL flip, mobile disable, plus API-level save and conflict paths. Drawio's full editor UI is intentionally NOT driven from the test тАФ it's flaky in headless Chromium and the postMessage save flow funnels into the same PUT endpoint we already exercise.

decisions.title: 3-way diff merge inside the conflict dialog (S012 brings diff infra).
decisions.detail: 3-way diff merge inside the conflict dialog (S012 brings diff infra).

decisions.title: File creation from the Files tab.
decisions.detail: File creation from the Files tab.

decisions.title: localStorage persistence for the dirty-buffer cache (currently
decisions.detail: localStorage persistence for the dirty-buffer cache (currently in-memory only; survives navigations within the SPA but not page reload). Would unlock "tab restored" on hard refresh.

decisions.title: AI-assisted conflict resolution when Claude tab is open.
decisions.detail: AI-assisted conflict resolution when Claude tab is open.

decisions.title: `go test ./internal/tab/files/...` тАФ PASS (4 tests, 0 failures)
decisions.detail: `go test ./internal/tab/files/...` тАФ PASS (4 tests, 0 failures)

decisions.title: `tests/e2e/s011_text_edit.py` тАФ **PASS (9 assertions)**
decisions.detail: `tests/e2e/s011_text_edit.py` тАФ **PASS (9 assertions)** - api: PUT 428 / 412 / 200 + ETag round-trip - (a) Edit тЖТ type тЖТ Save тЖТ file updated - (b) Ctrl+S triggers Save - (c) confirm dialog on file-switch with dirty buffer - (d) 412 тЖТ conflict dialog тЖТ Reload - (d2) 412 тЖТ conflict dialog тЖТ Overwrite - (e) no autocomplete suggestions in edit mode (VISION scope-out) - (f) Find/Replace widget opens via Ctrl+F - (g) mobile (414 px) Save flow OK

decisions.title: `tests/e2e/s011_drawio_edit.py` тАФ **PASS (5 assertions)**
decisions.detail: `tests/e2e/s011_drawio_edit.py` тАФ **PASS (5 assertions)** - (api) drawio PUT save round-trip - (api) drawio conflict 412 - (a) drawio default view mode (chrome=0) - (b) Edit toggles iframe to chrome=1 - (c) mobile (< 900 px) drawio Edit button disabled with tooltip

decisions.title: `tests/e2e/s010_files_preview.py` тАФ **PASS (11 assertions)** тАФ no
decisions.detail: `tests/e2e/s010_files_preview.py` тАФ **PASS (11 assertions)** тАФ no regression from S011 changes.

decisions.title: Monaco edit mode: VISION-scope-out features stay disabled
decisions.detail: Monaco edit mode: VISION-scope-out features stay disabled. **E2E (e) asserts the suggest widget never appears** even after typing a long identifier prefix in edit mode. If this test ever flakes, audit the `EDIT_OPTIONS` block in `monaco-view.tsx` тАФ every IDE-flavored knob must stay off.

decisions.title: Drawio in edit mode runs the full drawio chrome (`chrome=1`)
decisions.detail: Drawio in edit mode runs the full drawio chrome (`chrome=1`). drawio itself ships some IDE-flavored UI (XML edit panel, etc.). VISION scope-out applies to *Monaco*; for drawio we accept the upstream UI surface as-is тАФ it's an embedded webapp, not our editor.
